overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a sunny coastal path toward a medieval cliffside town. A child NPC exercises on the shore before running past as Geralt continues through shallow water toward the stone bridge entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grass path with distant water view

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy coast with a sword on back, observing the open water and distant landmarks

notable_agents.action: child performing squatting exercises and stretches on the grassy shore

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins on the left side of the coast
tall stone tower visible across the water in the distance
mountain range forming the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunny coastal grass path with open water views. A child NPC exercises on the right while distant stone towers and mountains are visible across the water.

events.description: camera turns right toward the cliffside town, transitioning from open water view to town approach

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cliffside town along the shore, passing wooden waterfront structures

notable_agents.action: child walking along the shore parallel to ego's path

entered.detail: medieval town built on rocky cliffs with red rooftops
tall stone tower rising above the town buildings
wooden house with elevated deck on stilts near the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to focus on the approaching cliffside town with its prominent stone tower and wooden waterfront house. The child walks parallel to Geralt along the grassy shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water along shore with wooden posts

events.description: ego steps from grassy shore into shallow water, changing ground surface
child NPC runs past ego from right to left through the shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water toward the town, passing wooden posts in the water

notable_agents.action: child running past ego through shallow water toward the town

entered.detail: clear shallow water covering the sandy shore
wooden barrier posts sticking out of the water
stone arch bridge leading into the town

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the shallow water along the shore, passing wooden posts as the child runs past toward the town. The cliffside town shifts to the left of the frame while a stone bridge becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water approach to town stone bridge

events.description: large flock of birds flies overhead in the sky
approaching the stone bridge entrance to the town

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water approaching the stone bridge entrance to the town

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the shore near the water's edge

entered.detail: gothic-style stone church with pointed arch windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the shallow water toward the town entrance as birds fly overhead. The stone bridge looms larger in the center while a gothic church stands on the right and a villager sits on the distant shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal path that gradually leads toward the stone entrance of a cliffside town. It begins with Geralt walking through grassy terrain overlooking open water, where a child exercises nearby against a backdrop of distant mountains and stone towers. As the camera advances, the focus shifts toward the town's prominent tower and wooden waterfront houses while the child walks parallel to the path. The scene then transitions as Geralt enters the shallow water, passing wooden posts while the child runs ahead and the town shifts to the left to reveal a stone bridge. Finally, the camera moves through the water toward the bridge as birds fly overhead, passing a gothic church on the right and a villager resting on the distant shore.
